name: OPIUM: Mitigating Steering Externalities and Over-Refusal via Dual Objective Latent Optimization
summary: arXiv:2607.19806v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Activation steering provides a lightweight mechanism for controlling large language models at inference time, but steering vectors can have...
description: arXiv:2607.19806v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Activation steering provides a lightweight mechanism for controlling large language models at inference time, but steering vectors can have unintended externalities: utility vectors may weaken safety behavior, while refusal vectors may induce over-refusal on benign prompts. We introduce OPIUM (Optimizing Protected Injections via Utility...
author: Kavin Aravindan, Arihant Rastogi, Krishak Aneja, Aadi Prasad, Saiyam Jain, Vaishnavi Shivkumar, Ponnurangam Kumaraguru
